# Google listing kit (Google-BP)

## Site purpose
DIY Google Business Profile listing kit for local service businesses: prioritized fixes, paste-ready copy, and plain-English steps. Customers apply updates themselves from their own Google account.

## Primary URL (canonical)
https://alphapulsx-jpg.github.io/Google-BP/

## Offer
- Price: USD $129.99 one-time
- Delivery: approximately 48 hours after completed intake form (short form ~5 minutes after payment)

## What is included
- Printable brochure (PDF)
- Written report with checklist and guidance
- Copy-paste steps so the buyer applies listing updates on their schedule

## Checkout / contact
See landing page for Stripe checkout.

## Policy
- No ranking, traffic, or revenue guarantees.
- DIY guidance only; not legal or financial advice.
- Not affiliated with Google. Google Business Profile is a trademark of Google LLC.
